name: Sherpa Travel Original Deluxe Airline Approved Pet Carrier
description: Take Me with You in Style Original Deluxe Carrier is specially designed for easy maintenance, use and comfort of your beloved pet. The carrier comes with a shoulder strap that makes it easy to carry around. The lambskin linen used inside can be washed. Special sunroof top mesh panels have been put for ventilation. Roll up/down flaps have been used so that your pet can even enjoy its privacy. A bed has been made inside the bag for added comfort. It is available in black and brown.Original Deluxe CarrierSunroof panels for ventilationRoll-up flapsAdjustableFits comfortably under cabin seatSizeDim
